workflows.name: mdp-data-operations-shell
workflows.title: Market Data Provider Manual - Data Operations Workspace
workflows.description: Capture the operator entry point for provider workflows.

steps.title: Data Operations Workspace
steps.notes: Open the Data Operations workspace to access provider, routing, and health tools.

steps.title: Providers
steps.notes: Review backfill provider settings, fallback order, dry-run planning, and audit history.

workflows.name: mdp-add-provider-wizard
workflows.title: Market Data Provider Manual - Add Provider Wizard
workflows.description: Capture the relationship-first provider onboarding wizard.

steps.title: Add Provider Wizard
steps.notes: Choose the provider family, enter credentials and scope, then validate and save the relationship.

workflows.name: mdp-data-sources
workflows.title: Market Data Provider Manual - Data Sources
workflows.description: Capture data source routing and failover settings.

steps.title: Data Sources
steps.notes: Set default real-time and historical sources, review failover behavior, and add feed-specific source definitions.

workflows.name: mdp-provider-health
workflows.title: Market Data Provider Manual - Provider Health
workflows.description: Capture provider monitoring and connection history.

steps.title: Provider Health
steps.notes: Confirm connection posture, latency, and recent health events after configuration changes.
